CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value UInt8);
SELECT id, value, NOT(value) AS negation_result FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE sub_query_table AS SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, NOT(value) AS negation FROM sub_query_table;
SELECT (SELECT NOT(value) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS negation_for_id_1;
SELECT id, value, (SELECT NOT(NOT(value)) FROM test_table WHERE id = 2) AS negation_for_id_2 FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE join_table (id UInt32, foreign_id UInt32);
SELECT jt.id, NOT(tt.value) as negation_result FROM join_table jt JOIN test_table tt ON jt.foreign_id = tt.id;
SELECT id, NOT(value) AS negation FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IN (1, 0));
SELECT id, value, NOT(value) AS negation, NOT(NOT(value)) AS double_negation FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
